hero.title: AI Automation for SMBs
hero.subtitle: We automate invoices, Google reviews, accounting and repetitive processes so you can focus on what matters: growing your business.

problems.title: Do any of these problems sound familiar?
problems.subtitle: These are the most common pain points we hear from SMBs like yours.
problems.p1title: Invoices from email one by one
problems.p1desc: You manually download invoices every month, copy data by hand, and errors creep in.
problems.p2desc: Opinions pile up without responses. Every ignored review is a customer who won't return.
problems.p3desc: You spend hours copying data from one Excel to another. Repetitive tasks a script would do in seconds.
problems.p4desc: Your accounting depends on repetitive tasks that consume hours every week.

services.title: What do we automate?
services.subtitle: We use Python, n8n and AI to eliminate repetitive work from your business.
services.s1desc: Custom scripts that read emails, process PDFs, fill spreadsheets and more.
services.s2desc: Connect your favorite tools without code: Gmail, Notion, Google Sheets, WhatsApp...
services.s3desc: We automatically respond to all your Google reviews with AI, personalized in your tone.

cases.title: Real cases
cases.subtitle: Projects already saving time for businesses like yours.

featured.title: Family service station + bar · Castellón
featured.challengeText: A family SMB managed 167 quarterly invoices by hand: they downloaded each PDF from email, copied supplier, amount and VAT to an Excel sheet and delivered it to their accountant. The process took over 10 hours each quarter and generated frequent errors.
featured.builtText: A Python script that automatically monitors email, extracts data from each invoice with pdfplumber, validates the information with AI (Claude API) and outputs everything into a structured Excel ready for the accountant.

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: Two UJI engineers obsessed with eliminating repetitive work.
about.sergioDesc: Computer Science engineer from UJI. Specialist in Python, APIs and automation architectures. Has worked on data processing projects for startups and SMBs.
about.ericDesc: Information Systems Engineer from UJI. Expert in n8n integrations, generative AI and business workflow automation.
about.location: Based in Castellón, we work with all of Spain.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.subtitle: A clear process with no surprises.
howWeWork.step1desc: You tell us your problem, we explain if and how we can solve it.
howWeWork.step2desc: You receive a detailed quote with scope, timelines and fixed price. No surprises.
howWeWork.step3desc: We develop the solution, test it thoroughly and keep you updated on progress.
howWeWork.step4desc: We deliver with documentation, train you and offer post-delivery support.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does an automation cost?
faq.a1: The price depends on complexity. A simple automation (read emails + Excel) can be between €500 and €1,500. More complex projects with integrated AI between €2,000 and €5,000. Always a fixed quote before starting.
faq.a2: A standard automation takes 1 to 3 weeks from budget approval. More complex projects may take 4-6 weeks. Always with intermediate milestones so you can see progress.
faq.a3: No. We handle everything: analysis, development, testing and launch. You just need to explain the process you want to automate.
faq.q4: What if something breaks after delivery?
faq.a4: We include 30 days post-delivery warranty. If something fails due to development issues, we fix it at no extra cost.
faq.q5: Do you only work with companies in Castellón?
faq.a5: No, we work with SMBs throughout Spain. The entire process is 100% remote: calls, demos and delivery are done by video call.
faq.a6: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance plans for automations in production: monitoring, updates and priority support.
faq.a7: Primarily Python (pdfplumber, openpyxl, imaplib), n8n for no-code flows, and AI models like Claude or GPT-4 for natural language processing.
faq.a8: Of course. We sign a confidentiality agreement before you share any sensitive business data.

includesList: AI configuration with your brand tone

faq.q1: How long does it take to implement an n8n flow?
faq.a1: A standard flow (3-5 steps) is usually ready in 3-5 business days.
faq.q2: Do I need to have n8n installed?
faq.a2: No. We handle cloud server hosting for n8n if you don't have your own infrastructure.
faq.a3: Yes. We train the model with examples from your business so the tone is consistent with your brand.

sobre.title: About Pymatic Labs
sobre.subtitle: Two UJI engineers with an obsession for automation.
sobre.storyText: Pymatic Labs was born from a conversation between Sergio and Eric while studying at the Universitat Jaume I de Castellón. Both saw how family businesses around them were losing hours every week to repetitive tasks that technology could solve. They decided to do something about it.
sobre.methodologyText: We believe in pragmatic automation: simple solutions that work, are maintainable and solve real problems. No over-engineering, no empty promises.
sobre.p1: Full transparency in budgets and timelines
sobre.p3: No lock-in clauses: the code is yours

contacto.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about the process
contacto.faq1q: What is the first call like?
contacto.faq1a: It's a 30-minute video call where you tell us your current process. No commitment.
contacto.faq2q: When will I receive the quote?

contacto.faq3a: No. The first call is completely free and with no commitment.
